profile_backing.source: frankenjax-cl9xa notes after B-panel packing and KC-blocked GEMM A/B
profile_backing.finding: KC blocking helped RAM-bound 4096^3 but was neutral in the L3-resident 1024^3-2048^3 regime; the remaining binding constraint was MR=NR=4 microkernel L1 arithmetic intensity.
profile_backing.current_kernel: MR4xNR4 scalar-register tile with packed-B panel-major reads and ascending-k per-cell accumulation.

baseline.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 5
baseline.note: Initial control only; worker differed from the candidate, so same-worker control below was decisive.

same_worker_control.command: temporary NR=4 restoration, then rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 5

candidate.lever: Widen the GEMM column register tile from NR=4 to NR=8 while leaving MR=4, packing, threading, and blocked scheduling unchanged.

proof.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture
proof.details: 7 matmul_2d tests passed, 1 ignored, including packed, threaded, large, and blocked bit-identity tests.

rebench.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 5

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: Candidate kept row-major output and each output cell still accumulated l=0..k-1 in ascending order.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: N/A: GEMM has no comparison or tie-breaking surface.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Candidate used the same scalar multiplication and addition sequence per cell; no FMA, mul_add, reassociation, SIMD reduction, mixed precision, or Strassen-style reordering.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A: matmul_2d consumes no random state.

validation: RCH candidate bit-identity proof passed on ts1 before rejection.
Same-worker RCH Criterion rebench rejected the candidate: NR4 control 22.040 ms midpoint vs NR8 candidate 23.963 ms midpoint.
Production tensor_contraction.rs source restored to NR4; git diff for tensor_contraction.rs is empty.

next_primitive.name: Strassen or explicit safe portable-SIMD microkernel with a behavior contract
next_primitive.reason: The NR-only register-tile micro-lever failed. The next pass must change the primitive, not keep tuning the same scalar tile.
next_primitive.target_ratio: >=2.0 score and a real win on 1024^3-2048^3 GEMM, with tolerance or bit-identity contract proven before commit.
